title: eDNA Extraction of 47mm Membrane Filters Using Zymo Miniprep Plus Kit
author: Eldridge Wisely
materials: Let sit at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Write the concentrations in your lab notebook.

steps.title: Clean extraction area with bleach or...
steps.instruction: Clean extraction area with bleach or DNA Away and UV for 15 minutes minimum if possible.

steps.title: turn on hula mixer/ incubator (55c at 124 rpm)
steps.instruction: turn on hula mixer/ incubator (55c at 124 rpm)

steps.title: If Proteinase K is not yet...
steps.instruction: If Proteinase K is not yet prepared, add 1040ul buffer to tube of Proteinase K powder from kit.

steps.title: add 20ul Proteinase K into all samples (in 5mL tubes)
steps.instruction: add 20ul Proteinase K into all samples (in 5mL tubes).

steps.title: Incubate tubes at 55C for 15...
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at 55C for 15 min on their sides in the hula mixer 124 rpm.

steps.title: Vortex samples again 5min at RT at speed setting 4
steps.instruction: Vortex samples again 5min at RT at speed setting 4

steps.title: prepare and label spin columns
steps.instruction: prepare and label spin columns.

steps.title: add 420ul of genomic binding buffer to each sample
steps.instruction: add 420ul of genomic binding buffer to each sample.

steps.title: Vortex samples again 5min at RT...
steps.instruction: Vortex samples again 5min at RT again at speed setting 4.

steps.title: Transfer 840ul of lysate from samples to spin columns
steps.instruction: Transfer 840ul of lysate from samples to spin columns.

steps.title: Centrifuge the spin columns at max...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the spin columns at max speed (greater than or equal to 12,000x g) for 1 minute

steps.title: Repeat go to step #15 until...
steps.instruction: Repeat go to step #15 until all lysate has been processed.

steps.title: Put spin columns in new collection...
steps.instruction: Put spin columns in new collection tubes and then add 400uL DNA pre-wash buffer to the spin column.

steps.title: If doing Qubit quantification after extraction,...
steps.instruction: If doing Qubit quantification after extraction, this is a good time to bring the Qubit buffer and standards to room temperature.

steps.title: add 700uL of g-DNA Wash Buffer to each spin column
steps.instruction: add 700uL of g-DNA Wash Buffer to each spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute, empty the spin column again.

steps.title: add 200uL of g-DNA Wash Buffer to each spin column
steps.instruction: add 200uL of g-DNA Wash Buffer to each spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute. Cut off caps of new 1.5mL tubes to hold the spin columns in the next step. (or use capless 1.5mL tubes)

steps.title: Place spin columns in 1
steps.instruction: Place spin columns in 1.5mL tubes with caps cut off.

steps.title: Add 100 uL warm ( 55...
steps.instruction: Add 100 uL warm ( 55 °C ) DNA Elution Buffer to directly to the filter in the spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute.

steps.title: transfer DNA eluate a new lo-bind 1
steps.instruction: transfer DNA eluate a new lo-bind 1.5mL micro centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Label your final 1
steps.instruction: Label your final 1.5mL lo-bind tubes

steps.title: centrifuge spin columns max speed 1...
steps.instruction: centrifuge spin columns max speed 1 minute, then empty the spin column

steps.title: put 2 more than your number...
steps.instruction: put 2 more than your number of samples of Qubit tubes into a clean empty 1000uL tip box

steps.title: add 2uL sample into the Qubit...
steps.instruction: add 2uL sample into the Qubit tubes, close and label them.

steps.title: add 10uL of each standard to...
steps.instruction: add 10uL of each standard to the their respective tubes, close and label them.

steps.title: Add 198uL of 1x HS Qubit...
steps.instruction: Add 198uL of 1x HS Qubit buffer (protect from light) to the Qubit tubes for the samples, and 190uL of 1x HS Qubit buffer to the two extra tubes.

steps.title: Close tubes tightly and vortex 10...
steps.instruction: Close tubes tightly and vortex 10 seconds, make sure there are no bubbles on the bottom. Place back in box and place box in drawer for 2 minutes minimum (but no more than 30 minutes).

steps.title: plug in Qubit reader, then select...
steps.instruction: plug in Qubit reader, then select the assay from the label on the Qubit buffer. (1x HS dsDNA)

steps.title: run standards, using standard 1 then standard 2
steps.instruction: run standards, using standard 1 then standard 2.

steps.title: Then select run samples
steps.instruction: Then select run samples. Select the amount of DNA extract you're using in each tube (in this case 2 uL), and the units you want reported (usually ng/uL).

steps.title: If your samples are stored in...
steps.instruction: If your samples are stored in 400uL of DNA/RNA Shield buffer (in vials, tubes, or Sterivex), add 400uL of DNA/RNA Shield to your extraction negative 5mL tube.

steps.title: If samples were not stored in...
steps.instruction: If samples were not stored in 400uL of DNA/RNA Shield, use either 400uL DNA/RNA Shield or 200uL of Red Biofluid and Cell buffer and 200uL of DNA Elution Buffer in all samples and also the negative control.

steps.title: place elution buffer in incubator/hula mixer...
steps.instruction: place elution buffer in incubator/hula mixer after taking out the samples.

steps.title: Store sample eluate in the freezer (-20 C)
steps.instruction: Store sample eluate in the freezer (-20 C)

steps.title: Vortex samples 5min at RT at speed setting 4
steps.instruction: Vortex samples 5min at RT at speed setting 4
